events.name: REORDER
events.description: Event emitted on reorder: UI:{reorderEvent} with { fromIndex, toIndex }

events.name: ITEM_CLICK
events.description: When set, the whole row is clickable and emits UI:{itemClickEvent} with { id, row } (action-button clicks stopPropagation so they still win).

events.name: SWIPE_LEFT
events.description: Event emitted on left swipe: UI:{swipeLeftEvent} with { row }

events.name: SWIPE_RIGHT
events.description: Event emitted on right swipe: UI:{swipeRightEvent} with { row }

events.name: LONG_PRESS
events.description: Event emitted on long press: UI:{longPressEvent} with { row }

events.name: LOAD_MORE
events.description: Event emitted when more items needed: UI:{loadMoreEvent}

events.name: VIEW
events.description: User opened a record from the list.

events.name: DataListLoaded
events.description: DataList rows finished loading; payload.data holds the collection.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Accepts
overridableConfigKeys.description: When set, the container accepts drops whose dragGroup matches this value (or '*' for any group)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Class Name
overridableConfigKeys.description: Additional CSS classes

overridableConfigKeys.label: Columns
overridableConfigKeys.description: Alias for `fields` — the compiler emits `columns` for field defs.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Current User
overridableConfigKeys.description: Current user identifier; messages matching this value align right (used with variant: 'message')

overridableConfigKeys.label: Dnd Item Id Field
overridableConfigKeys.description: Row field used as the @dnd-kit draggable id (default 'id')

overridableConfigKeys.label: Dnd Root
overridableConfigKeys.description: Mark this container as the DnD root for its subtree — descendant zones share one DndContext (cross-container drag). Use on an outer container whose own items are not draggable.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Drag Group
overridableConfigKeys.description: When set, items in this container are draggable and announce this group as their source

overridableConfigKeys.label: Drop Event
overridableConfigKeys.description: Bus event fired on cross-container drop. Payload: { id, sourceGroup, targetGroup, newIndex }

overridableConfigKeys.label: Error
overridableConfigKeys.description: Error state

overridableConfigKeys.label: Fields
overridableConfigKeys.description: Field definitions for rendering each row. The pattern contract in `@almadar/core/patterns` documents `columns` as the wire-format alias the compiler emits — both names resolve to the same shape here. Pass either.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Gap
overridableConfigKeys.description: Gap between rows

overridableConfigKeys.label: Group By
overridableConfigKeys.description: Group items by a field value (renders section headers between groups)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Has More
overridableConfigKeys.description: Whether more items are available for infinite scroll

overridableConfigKeys.label: Infinite Scroll
overridableConfigKeys.description: Enable infinite scroll loading

overridableConfigKeys.label: Is Loading
overridableConfigKeys.description: Loading state

overridableConfigKeys.label: Item Click Event
overridableConfigKeys.description: When set, the whole row is clickable and emits UI:{itemClickEvent} with { id, row } (action-button clicks stopPropagation so they still win).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Load More Event
overridableConfigKeys.description: Event emitted when more items needed: UI:{loadMoreEvent}

overridableConfigKeys.label: Long Press Event
overridableConfigKeys.description: Event emitted on long press: UI:{longPressEvent} with { row }

overridableConfigKeys.label: Look
overridableConfigKeys.description: Layer 2 visual treatment — mirrors the `entity-table` look enum so data-grid / data-list / entity-table share one knob name from authors.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Max Inline Actions
overridableConfigKeys.description: Max inline action buttons before the rest collapse into a '⋯' overflow menu. Omit = all inline.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Page Size
overridableConfigKeys.description: Max items to show before 'Show More' button. Defaults to 5. Set to 0 to disable.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Position Event
overridableConfigKeys.description: Bus event fired N times per drop (one per item in affected zones) so the trait can persist new positions for the WHOLE zone, not just the moved item. Payload: { id, position }

overridableConfigKeys.label: Reorder Event
overridableConfigKeys.description: Event emitted on reorder: UI:{reorderEvent} with { fromIndex, toIndex }

overridableConfigKeys.label: Reorderable
overridableConfigKeys.description: Enable drag-to-reorder with grip handles

overridableConfigKeys.label: Sender Field
overridableConfigKeys.description: Field name identifying the sender (used with variant: 'message')

overridableConfigKeys.label: Sortable
overridableConfigKeys.description: Enable in-container reorder; items can be dragged to new positions among siblings

overridableConfigKeys.label: Swipe Left Actions
overridableConfigKeys.description: Actions revealed on left swipe

overridableConfigKeys.label: Swipe Left Event
overridableConfigKeys.description: Event emitted on left swipe: UI:{swipeLeftEvent} with { row }

overridableConfigKeys.label: Swipe Right Actions
overridableConfigKeys.description: Actions revealed on right swipe

overridableConfigKeys.label: Swipe Right Event
overridableConfigKeys.description: Event emitted on right swipe: UI:{swipeRightEvent} with { row }

overridableConfigKeys.label: Variant
overridableConfigKeys.description: Visual variant
